site.title: Etuluku ya mosala mpo na makambo matali makoki ya kokoma na mikili misusu
site.tagline: Kobanda na mposa ya kozala na likoki ya kokɔta na bakompanyi ya Leta
nav.label: Motángo ya liboso
meta.home.description: IATF ebongolaka bosenga ya bosengi ya solo na bisika ya kobomba mikanda ya polele.
meta.projects.description: Kotala misala ya bato nyonso oyo ebimisami na nzela ya IATF.
meta.propose.description: Kosenga projet ya accessibilité na IATF na nzela ya web, email, to Discord.
meta.governance.description: Tanga ndenge IATF endimaka ba projets, ekambaka ba référentiels, mpe ebombaka misala ya bato banso.
meta.join.description: Lolenge ya kosangana na IATF: kopesa code, kobongola, komeka, to kobatela projet.
meta.accessibility.description: Ndenge nini IATF ekoluka kobatela site oyo mpo moto nyonso akoka kokɔta na yango mpe ndenge nini koyebisa mokakatano oyo moto akoki kozala na yango mpo na kokɔta na site yango.
meta.transparency.description: Mikanda ya IATF oyo ezali ya bato nyonso: bikateli, misala, mpe bansango ya sika etikalaka polele.
actions.emailProjects: Tindela ba projets na boîte de réception
registry.empty.title: Mikano mibimisami naino te
registry.empty.body: IATF ezali kobongisa mosala na yango ya liboso mpo na bato nyonso.
proposal.form.title: Tinda bosengi
proposal.form.body: Tondisá formilɛrɛ oyo ezali awa na nse mpo na kotinda mokanda na IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript esengeli mpo na kosalela formulaire oyo. Soki ezali te, salela email to Discord na esika na yango.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Kotinda na lombangu etongami te na esika oyo. Formule oyo ekofungola client na yo ya e-mail na esika wana.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Nazali komibongisa mpo na kokɔtisama na esika ya libateli...
proposal.form.ready: Ntango okotinda bosengi, IATF ekobimisa mokanda ya bosengi.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Tosengi na yo otondisa vérification ya protection ya spam liboso ya kotinda.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Kobatelama na spam esilaki. Tosengi na yo otalisa lisusu liboso ya kotinda.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kobatelama na spam ekoki kotalisama te sika oyo. Meka lisusu.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Temps ya protection ya spam esili. Meka lisusu.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Tosɛngi yo otondisa bisika oyo esengeli liboso ya kotinda mokanda.
proposal.form.success: Matɔndi mingi, tozwaki mokanda na yo mpe tobombaki yango mpo na kotalela yango lisusu.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Soki osololi lisusu na IATF na ntina na bosengi oyo, lakisa référence oyo ezali awa na nse.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Likambo moko ya mabe esalamaki ntango otindaki bosengi. Meka lisusu. Soki mokakatano ezali kokoba, salela email na esika na yango.
project.detail.eyebrow: Kokɔta na mosala ya bato nyonso
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Ezali na kati ya makambo oyo esɛngami te
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Euti na Lingelesi mpamba, mabongoli ekoki kobakisama na nsima
footer.label: Lokasa ya nse ya lokasa
footer.blurb: Mosala ya kopesa bato likoki ya kozwa mikanda esengeli kozala pɛtɛɛ mpo na kobanda yango, mpo na kobimisa yango, mpe mpo na kobatela yango polele.
footer.source: Ndimbola ya mitindá mya bokoki: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Makambo oyo bato oyo basalelaka baaparɛyi ya mikolo oyo bazali kosala.
contact.label: Bato ya kosolola na bango
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Nazali koluka moto oyo akosalisa ngai
translation.label: Etɛlɛmɛlo ya libongoli
translation.source: Lingelesi ezali lokótá ya ebandeli ya lokasa oyo.
translation.humanReviewed: Moto moko oyo ayebi koloba malamu nde atalelaki lisusu libongoli yango.
translation.machineAssisted: Libongoli oyo ezali na lisalisi ya masini mpe eyebisami naino mobimba te na molobi oyo ayebi koloba malamu. Makanisi ezali malamu na nzela ya GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Libongoli oyo etalelamaki lisusu liboso ya libongoli ya sika ya Lingelesi mpe ekoki kozala na ntina ya kotalela yango lisusu.
translation.report: Lakisa mokakatano ya bobongoli: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Ezali mpenza bongo .
